scripts.build: npm run build -w core-api && npm run build -w admin-portal
scripts.infra:up:tls: npm run tls:cert:generate && docker compose --profile tls up -d
scripts.load:k6:smoke: docker compose --profile loadtest run --rm k6 --tag scenario=api_smoke --env K6_SCENARIO=smoke
scripts.load:k6:spike: docker compose --profile loadtest run --rm k6 --tag scenario=api_spike --env K6_SCENARIO=spike
scripts.load:k6:stress: docker compose --profile loadtest run --rm k6 --tag scenario=api_stress --env K6_SCENARIO=stress
scripts.load:k6:enhanced: docker compose --profile loadtest run --rm k6 run /scripts/k6ImLoadEnhanced.js
scripts.load:k6:enhanced:smoke: docker compose --profile loadtest run --rm k6 run /scripts/k6ImLoadEnhanced.js --env K6_SCENARIO=smoke
scripts.load:k6:enhanced:load: docker compose --profile loadtest run --rm k6 run /scripts/k6ImLoadEnhanced.js --env K6_SCENARIO=load
scripts.load:k6:enhanced:stress: docker compose --profile loadtest run --rm k6 run /scripts/k6ImLoadEnhanced.js --env K6_SCENARIO=stress
